teacherv1.name: teacherv1
teacherv1.description: Same 3B base model as the student. The teacher differs only by prompt: before choosing the final score, it reasons from three disagreement-aware perspectives inspired by the data/task/annotator taxonomy: data factors, task factors, and annotator factors. It still outputs only score JSON. Confidence is computed from generated-token log probabilities with Logit Geom.
